title: mumei feature summary
description: Per-feature roll-up returned by GET /api/features. Computed by dashboard/server/features.ts from .mumei/specs/<f>/state.json + .mumei/plans/<f>/state.json + cost-log.jsonl + git log + tasks.md. Producer: dashboard backend. Consumer: dashboard frontend (Dashboard, DetailPanel header). Backward-compatibility: existing fields MUST NOT be renamed or removed (REQ-15.21); add-only.

id.description: REQ-N for spec vehicle, equals slug for plan vehicle.

nextPhase.description: Predicted next phase under normal flow; null when done.

currentWave.description: Active Wave for spec vehicle. Null for plan vehicle (no Wave concept).

totalWaves.description: Spec vehicle: count of '## Wave N:' headers in tasks.md. Plan vehicle: task_created_count.

waveProgress.description: Spec vehicle: completed Waves (committed). Plan vehicle: task_completed_count.

lastVerdict.description: Verdict from the most recent review JSON (Phase 5 / /mumei:examine). Null when no review has run yet.

lastIter.description: Review iter index from the most recent review JSON. Current orchestrator caps at 3 (REQ-7.6) but historical archived reviews may carry higher values; no upper bound is enforced here.

tokens.description: Sum of input_tokens + output_tokens from cost-log.jsonl entries (phase=after) for this feature.

lastActivityMin.description: Minutes since the most recent of: state.json mtime, latest commit touching feature paths, latest cost-log entry.

pulse.description: Derived from lastActivityMin: <60 active, <1440 idle, else stalled.

findings.description: Surfaced findings count from latest review JSON.

archived.description: True when feature lives under .mumei/archive/<YYYY-MM>/<slug>/. Frontend collapses these into a separate section.
